name: Drider Scaramouche
description:
Who thought it was a good idea to go explore a cave ? You'll have to pay the consequences.

Bot PFP is by susucre!

Headers decorations are from cafekitsune!

Additional pictures are AI generated (by yours truly)

Dividers are from tumblr (no particular account)

TW: Spider (duh), monsterfucking, oviposition, egg laying, breeding, possible noncon..??

Don't interact if you don't like it.

Don't ask me "why did you make this bot". The answer is plain and simple: I wanted to.

Find me weird or gross if you want, I don't care.

Author's note: I haven't tested this bot personally, even after the year and half that passed. I cannot guarantee how it will work for any male user (or bodily male at least) since it has a huge breeding kink and I didn't really know how to include them.. and I'm too scared to fuck it up to try to change anything in what I wrote after so long.
If it works for you, then I'm glad about it! If not, I'm really sorry and you can come to request me either in the comments or here for another version or even another bot!
You can also commission me if you want me to do a bot for you! Just make sure to read my TOS beforehand! Everything is on my profile!

Please let a review if you liked it! You can also do so if you didn't, but then please tell me what was the problem (beside JLLM, I can't do anything about it...)

Thank you for perhaps checking this out!! <3
creator: May_uichi
